content.text: Let me start by reading the files that need to be modified.

content.content:
1→{
     2→  config,
     3→  pkgs,
     4→  lib,
     5→  ...
     6→}:
     7→
     8→{
     9→  imports = [
    10→    ./hypridle.nix
    11→    ./hyprlock.nix
    12→    ./hyprpaper.nix
    13→    ./mako.nix
    14→    ./waybar.nix
    15→  ];
    16→
    17→  home.packages = with pkgs; [
    18→    grim # Screenshot tool
    19→    slurp # Region selector
    20→    swappy # Snapshot editor
    21→    wl-clipboard # Clipboard manager
    22→    wf-recorder # Screen recorder
    23→    ffmpeg # For GIF conversion
    24→    jq # JSON processor
    25→
    26→    # Script to record GIF
    27→    (pkgs.writeShellScriptBin "record-gif" ''
    28→      #!/usr/bin/env bash
    29→      # Define output
    30→      DATE=$(date +%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M-%S)
    31→      DIR="$HOME/Pictures/GIFs"
    32→      MKV="$DIR/recording_$DATE.mkv"
    33→      GIF="$DIR/recording_$DATE.gif"
    34→
    35→      mkdir -p "$DIR"
    36→
    37→      # Notify and Select Region
    38→      notify-send "GIF Recording" "Select region to start recording..."
    39→
    40→      if ! REGION=$(slurp); then
    41→          notify-send "GIF Recording" "Cancelled"
    42→          exit 1
    43→      fi
    44→
    45→      notify-send "GIF Recording" "Recording started! Press Super+Shift+S to stop."
    46→
    47→      # Record to MKV (more robust than MP4 for interruption)
    48→      wf-recorder -g "$REGION" -f "$MKV"
    49→
    50→      # Convert to GIF after recording stops
    51→      notify-send "GIF Recording" "Converting to GIF..."
    52→
    53→      # Generate palette for better quality
    54→      palette="/tmp/palette.png"
    55→      # higher quality scale
    56→      filters="fps=15,scale=720:-1:flags=lanczos"
    57→
    58→      ffmpeg -v warning -i "$MKV" -vf "$filters,palettegen" -y "$palette"
    59→      ffmpeg -v warning -i "$MKV" -i "$palette" -lavfi "$filters [x]; [x][1:v] paletteuse" -y "$GIF"
    60→
    61→      rm "$palette"
    62→      rm "$MKV"
    63→
    64→      notify-send "GIF Recording" "Saved to $GIF"
    65→      wl-copy "$GIF"
    66→    '')
    67→
    68→    # Screenshot scripts (avoids quoting issues in Hyprland binds)
    69→    (pkgs.writeShellScriptBin "screenshot-region" ''
    70→      REGION=$(slurp) || exit 0
    71→      grim -g "$REGION" - | wl-copy
    72→    '')
    73→    (pkgs.writeShellScriptBin "screenshot-region-edit" ''
    74→      REGION=$(slurp) || exit 0
    75→      grim -g "$REGION" - | swappy -f -
    76→    '')
    77→
    78→    # Cheatsheet Script
    79→    (pkgs.writeShellScriptBin "hypr-cheatsheet" ''
    80→      #!/usr/bin/env bash
    81→      # Parse keybindings from hyprctl using structured JSON
    82→      hyprctl binds -j | jq -r '
    83→        .[]
    84→        | select(.has_description and .description != "")
    85→        | (
    86→            (if .modmask == 0 then ""
    87→             else [
    88→               (if (.modmask % 128) >= 64 then "Super" else empty end),
    89→               (if (.modmask % 2) >= 1 then "Shift" else empty end),
    90→               (if (.modmask % 8) >= 4 then "Ctrl" else empty end),
    91→               (if (.modmask % 16) >= 8 then "Alt" else empty end)
    92→             ] | join(" + ")
    93→             end)
    94→          ) as $mods
    95→        | (if $mods == "" then .key else $mods + " + " + .key end)
    96→          + " — " + .description
    97→      ' | wofi --dmenu --width 1000 --height 600 -p "Keybindings"
    98→    '')
    99→  ];
   100→
   101→  wayland.windowManager.hyprland = {
   102→    enable = true;
   103→    settings = {
   104→      # --- Monitors ---
   105→      # Auto-detect monitors with preferred resolution
   106→      # Format: name, resolution, position, scale
   107→      monitor = [
   108→        "DP-2, highrr, auto, 1"
   109→        ", preferred, auto, 1"
   110→      ];
   111→
   112→      # --- Input ---
   113→      input = {
   114→        kb_layout = "us";
   115→        follow_mouse = 1;
   116→        sensitivity = 0; # -1.0 - 1.0, 0 means no modification.
   117→        natural_scroll = true;
   118→      };
   119→
   120→      # --- General ---
   121→      general = {
   122→        gaps_in = 5;
   123→        gaps_out = 10;
   124→        border_size = 2;
   125→        "col.active_border" = "rgb(cba6f7) rgb(94e2d5) 45deg"; # Catppuccin Mocha Mauve -> Teal
   126→        "col.inactive_border" = "rgb(585b70)"; # Catppuccin Mocha Surface2
   127→        layout = "dwindle";
   128→      };
   129→
   130→      # --- Decoration ---
   131→      decoration = {
   132→        rounding = 10;
   133→        blur = {
   134→          enabled = true;
   135→          size = 3;
   136→          passes = 1;
   137→        };
   138→        shadow = {
   139→          enabled = true;
   140→          range = 4;
   141→          render_power = 3;
   142→          color = "rgba(1e1e2eee)"; # Catppuccin Mocha Base
   143→        };
   144→      };
   145→
   146→      # --- Cursor ---
   147→      cursor = {
   148→        no_hardware_cursors = true;
   149→      };
   150→
   151→      # --- Layer Rules ---
   152→      layerrule = [
   153→        "blur on, ignore_alpha 1, match:namespace waybar"
   154→        "blur on, ignore_alpha 1, match:namespace notifications"
   155→      ];
   156→
   157→      # --- Window Rules ---
   158→      # Hide Chrome's Spotify "now playing" floating popup (redundant with waybar mpris)
   159→      windowrule = [
   160→        "match:class ^(google-chrome)$, match:float yes, match:title .*•.*, workspace special:trash silent"
   161→      ];
   162→
   163→      # --- Keybindings ---
   164→      "$mainMod" = "SUPER";
   165→      bindd = [
   166→        "$mainMod, Q, Open terminal, exec, kitty"
   167→        "$mainMod, C, Close window, killactive,"
   168→        "$mainMod, M, Lock screen, exec, hyprlock"
   169→        "$mainMod, E, File manager, exec, dolphin"
   170→        "$mainMod, Y, Terminal file manager, exec, kitty -e yazi"
   171→        "$mainMod, B, Open browser, exec, google-chrome-stable"
   172→        "$mainMod, V, Toggle floating, togglefloating,"
   173→        "$mainMod, R, App launcher, exec, wofi --show drun"
   174→        "$mainMod, slash, Keybindings cheatsheet, exec, hypr-cheatsheet"
   175→        "$mainMod, P, Pseudotile, pseudo,"
   176→        "$mainMod, L, Lock screen, exec, hyprlock"
   177→
   178→        # Focus
   179→        "$mainMod, left, Focus left, movefocus, l"
   180→        "$mainMod, right, Focus right, movefocus, r"
   181→        "$mainMod, up, Focus up, movefocus, u"
   182→        "$mainMod, down, Focus down, movefocus, d"
   183→
   184→        # Move window
   185→        "$mainMod SHIFT, left, Move window left, movewindow, l"
   186→        "$mainMod SHIFT, right, Move window right, movewindow, r"
   187→        "$mainMod SHIFT, up, Move window up, movewindow, u"
   188→        "$mainMod SHIFT, down, Move window down, movewindow, d"
   189→
   190→        # Workspaces
   191→        "$mainMod, 1, Workspace 1, workspace, 1"
   192→        "$mainMod, 2, Workspace 2, workspace, 2"
   193→        "$mainMod, 3, Workspace 3, workspace, 3"
   194→        "$mainMod, 4, Workspace 4, workspace, 4"
   195→        "$mainMod, 5, Workspace 5, workspace, 5"
   196→
   197→        # Move to workspace
   198→        "$mainMod SHIFT, 1, Move to workspace 1, movetoworkspace, 1"
   199→        "$mainMod SHIFT, 2, Move to workspace 2, movetoworkspace, 2"
   200→        "$mainMod SHIFT, 3, Move to workspace 3, movetoworkspace, 3"
   201→        "$mainMod SHIFT, 4, Move to workspace 4, movetoworkspace, 4"
   202→        "$mainMod SHIFT, 5, Move to workspace 5, movetoworkspace, 5"
   203→
   204→        # Screenshots
   205→        ", Print, Screenshot region to clipboard, exec, screenshot-region"
   206→        "$mainMod, Print, Screenshot region to editor, exec, screenshot-region-edit"
   207→        "SHIFT, Print, Screenshot fullscreen, exec, grim - | wl-copy"
   208→
   209→        # Screenshot alternatives (no Print key)
   210→        "$mainMod SHIFT, P, Screenshot region to clipboard, exec, screenshot-region"
   211→        "$mainMod ALT, P, Screenshot region to editor, exec, screenshot-region-edit"
   212→        "$mainMod CTRL, P, Screenshot fullscreen, exec, grim - | wl-copy"
   213→
   214→        # Screen recording
   215→        "$mainMod SHIFT, G, Record GIF, exec, record-gif"
   216→        "$mainMod SHIFT, S, Stop recording, exec, pkill --signal SIGINT wf-recorder"
   217→
   218→        # Notifications
   219→        "$mainMod SHIFT, N, Restore notification, exec, makoctl restore"
   220→        "$mainMod, N, Dismiss notification, exec, makoctl dismiss"
   221→      ];
   222→
   223→      # --- Mouse Bindings ---
   224→      bindm = [
   225→        "ALT, mouse:272, movewindow"
   226→        "ALT, mouse:273, resizewindow"
   227→      ];
   228→
   229→      debug = {
   230→        disable_logs = false;
   231→      };
   232→    };
   233→  };
   234→
   235→  systemd.user.targets.hyprland-session = {
   236→    Unit = {
   237→      Description = lib.mkForce "Hyprland session";
   238→      BindsTo = [ "graphical-session.target" ];
   239→      Wants = [ "graphical-session.target" ];
   240→      After = [ "graphical-session.target" ];
   241→    };
   242→  };
   243→}
   244→

git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Replace wofi with fuzzel for app launcher and dmenu

Fuzzel is Wayland-native with proper fuzzy/substring matching, unlike
wofi's dmenu mode which only matches from word starts. Adds Catppuccin
Mocha themed fuzzel configuration.
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Replace wofi with fuzzel for app launcher and dmenu" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Replace wofi with fuzzel as the app launcher and dmenu replacement across hyprland config
- Fuzzel provides proper fuzzy/substring matching (wofi's dmenu mode only matches from word starts, making the keybindings cheatsheet frustrating to search)
- Add Catppuccin Mocha themed `programs.fuzzel` configuration with matching border and color settings

## Test plan
- [x] `nix flake check` passes
- [x] No remaining wofi references in codebase
- [ ] Verify `Super+R` launches fuzzel in drun mode
- [ ] Verify `Super+/` cheatsheet opens with fuzzel dmenu and supports substring search

Run: 20260317-0739-801b
EOF
)"

content.text:
PR created: https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/354

Changes made:
- **home/workstation.nix**: Replaced `wofi` with `fuzzel` in packages, added `programs.fuzzel` config with Catppuccin Mocha theme
- **home/hyprland.nix**: Updated cheatsheet script to use `fuzzel --dmenu`, updated app launcher binding to use `fuzzel`
- All wofi references removed, `nix flake check` passes
